notes: Ran Debit/Credit benchmarks on both DEC and IBM hardware July 1988; showed price/performance advantage.
Claimed machines perform 3x faster than DEC's measurements; ran own Debit/Credit tests on 9370/4381 only.
TPC founding member; Tandem held 240 TPS record on cluster of 16 before Oracle broke it.
Set world record of 265 TPS on Amdahl 3090-600E MVS; also 49 TPS on VAX 6240; 124 TPS on Sequent UNIX.
John Logan VP cited as calling IBM response 'pure FUD'.
TPC founding member; fault-tolerant TP systems.
